text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I hear a familiar voice from the park
while out on a walk...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's why... you know! Is this a... place for...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
...And, like... such a pain! I want you to... just
like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and Daitaku Helios are arguing
about something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can guess what kind of issue a disciplinary
committee member and a party lover might be
arguing about.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Even if we don't have classes, this kind of
behavior is unacceptable!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'moooon! It's a day off! Let it slide, just this
once! ☆

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! In fact, you need to write an
essay explaining yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I imagine it's something like that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ugh! We're going to do this just like we planned!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey hey! ☆ Bet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Helios said she found a lost dog!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I saw it when I was running! The poor
pupper looked so lost and sad! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I bet the owner is legit losing their mind right
now.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So we like, gotta help it out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We already came up with a plan to find the
owner!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try shouting for them in case they're
still nearby.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna post on Umastagram to get this on
everyone's feed! Waheeeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Dog Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for the trouble! Thank you so much
for finding him!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No more running off on your own, now, you
hear?!
choice_data_list: You two make a great team.
You two make a great team.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Anyone would want to help out if they found a
dog in distress!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Right?! But y'know, there's a reason why we're
besties now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Actually, Helios and I run together all the time!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Yeah! It's actually, like, low-key magical. I
think we've run together, like, eight times already
this month!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes! We don't plan it or anything, but we're
always at the same place at the same time. It's
almost like destiny is bringing us together!
choice_data_list: Well, I hope you two keep at it.
Well, I hope you two keep at it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes! We don't plan it or anything, but we're
always at the same place at the same time. It's
almost like destiny is bringing us together!
choice_data_list: Well, I hope you two keep at it.
Well, I hope you two keep at it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: There's zero chance I give up on my bestie!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, why don't we go for a run since we're
here and all?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! Now you're talking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the two of them enjoy a friendly run.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Psychic?! Do you really think so?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For real?! That goes sooo hard! ☆ Do you really
think we have superpowers?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: If so, I want to use this power for good!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wanna be superhero besties?! It'll be awesome!
We'll be auramaxxing like there's no tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! If we're gonna be superheroes, we've got
to hide our identities! We're gonna need
costumes too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the two of them get so excited, I can't
bring myself to tell them I was only joking.
